items.title: UCL live: PSG extend lead, Barça still chasing comeback
items.summary: Enjoy all the updates from today's UEFA Champions League quarterfinals, which include Atlético Madrid vs. Barcelona and Liverpool vs. Paris Saint-Germain.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Report: The Athletic will continue its investigation despite Dianna Russini's resignation
items.summary: Dianna Russini has resigned from The Athletic during a company review of her work, in the aftermath of the publication one week ago of photos with Patriots coach Mike Vrabel.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: CSK win two in a row for the first time since April 2024
items.summary: Samson top scored for CSK once again, while Noor Ahmad returned to form with 3 for 21
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
